//: Phase 3 hard gates. Scripts live in .claude/hooks/ (PowerShell, DEC-20). Invoked via explicit 'pwsh -NoProfile -File' so execution does not depend on the host's default shell or the 'shell' hook field (DEC-24).

PreToolUse.//: agents-never-merge (global Bash leg) + no-commit-on-main. Leaves 'gh pr merge' OPEN so the orchestrator can merge on founder approval.

hooks.//: no commit on a red suite — runs the suite only on a commit attempt.

PreToolUse.//: agents-never-merge (GitHub plugin merge tool, DEC-7). Global block; the orchestrator merges via 'gh pr merge' in Bash, not this tool.
spec-freeze: design/ is frozen during implementation. Comment this entry out to run a spec-authoring pass (see docs/agentic-build.md).
